description_long: A rectangular loaf of bread with a golden-brown, slightly domed crust sits atop a white napkin on a rustic wooden slat surface. The loaf features three distinct rounded humps on top, giving it a classic pull-apart appearance. The crust is textured with a subtle, uneven pattern, and the sides are smooth and pale, indicating a soft, fluffy interior. The bread appears unsliced, with no visible cuts or separations along its length. The wooden surface beneath is weathered and irregular, adding a natural, artisanal context to the presentation. No branding, packaging, or labeling is visible on the bread or its immediate surroundings.
description: A golden-brown, unsliced loaf of bread with three rounded humps sits on a white napkin atop a rustic wooden surface. The crust is textured and the sides are smooth and pale.
description_view_0: The loaf is viewed from the side, showing three rounded humps and a textured golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: The loaf is viewed from the end, displaying a single rounded end and the pale, smooth side of the bread.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the loaf is visible, again showing the three rounded humps and the pale, soft side.
description_view_3: The loaf is viewed from the other end, revealing the rounded end and the crust's texture.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a slightly uneven, dimpled texture with three rounded humps on top, giving it a pull-apart appearance. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring.
